allow: PowerShell(foreach \($c in 'node','npm','git'\) { $p = Get-Command $c -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($p\) { "$c -> $\(& $c --version\)" } else { "$c -> NOT FOUND" } }; '--- contenido del directorio ---'; $items = Get-ChildItem -Force -Name; if \($items\) { $items } else { '\(vacío\)' })
